_comment: Scenario 17: Radar Gazebo SITL — verify GazeboRadarBackend produces detections and fuses with camera perception during a full mission.

scenario.name: radar_gazebo
scenario.description: Fly a 5-waypoint mission with Gazebo radar backend enabled. Validates that GazeboRadarBackend subscribes to gz-transport topics, receives gpu_lidar scans, converts them to RadarDetectionList, and the UKF fusion engine consumes them. Full perception stack (color_contour + ByteTrack + UKF) runs in parallel. No HD-map — obstacles discovered at runtime via radar+camera. Requires Gazebo with x500_companion model and working GPU (NVIDIA EGL).

obstacle_avoidance._comment: D* Lite is primary avoidance. Avoider is safety net: 8m influence, 1.5 max correction (100% of cruise), gain=3.0.
obstacle_avoidance._comment_706: Issue #706 — turn OFF the scenario-33 safety nets so this Gazebo scenario runs with legacy main-branch avoider behaviour for empirical comparison.

occupancy_grid._comment: 2m grid, 2m inflation, 1.0s TTL. promotion_hits=8. max_static_cells=800 caps grid bloat.

mission_planner._comment_static_obstacles: Empty — no HD-map. Radar+camera discover obstacles at runtime.

geofence._comment: Geofence disabled — D* Lite replanning may push drone toward boundary when avoiding obstacles

waypoints._comment: Fly east — clear corridor north of field.
Fly southeast — GREEN(10,10) and BLUE(18,5) nearby.

mission_planner._comment_waypoints: 5 waypoints routing through obstacle field. Radar+camera detect obstacles for D* Lite replanning.

tracker._comment: ByteTrack two-stage association for robust obstacle tracking

radar._comment: Radar enabled — HAL ground filter at 2.0m AGL rejects noise-elevated ground returns (Issue #340)
Camera+radar UKF fusion with ground filter + altitude gate. Tightened orphan params to reduce multipath ghost tracks (Issue #345).

path_a._comment_706: Issue #706 — explicitly disable PR #647 voxel-snapshot append. PATH A inactive in this scenario (no SAM), so this is mainly documentation.
